groups.instruction: Answer the questions based on the audio.
groups.prompt_html:
MATCHING INFORMATION TO CATEGORIES 37

Questions 26 - 30

Choose the comment the students make about each of the following clauses from Magna Carta

26 Clause 40

27 Clause 8

28 Clause 33

29 Clause 2

30 Clause 35

A - Many people are familiar with it.B - It allows a person freedom of choice.C - It helped to solve a common problem.D - It is hard to understand the purpose of this clause.E - When it was introduced, it is likely to have been unpopular.F - It is one of a number of clauses that deal with a similar topic.G - To people nowadays, it seems to be stating the obvious.A - Many people are familiar with it.B - It allows a person freedom of choice.C - It helped to solve a common problem.D - It is hard to understand the purpose of this clause.E - When it was introduced, it is likely to have been unpopular.F - It is one of a number of clauses that deal with a similar topic.G - To people nowadays, it seems to be stating the obvious.A - Many people are familiar with it.B - It allows a person freedom of choice.C - It helped to solve a common problem.D - It is hard to understand the purpose of this clause.E - When it was introduced, it is likely to have been unpopular.F - It is one of a number of clauses that deal with a similar topic.G - To people nowadays, it seems to be stating the obvious.A - Many people are familiar with it.B - It allows a person freedom of choice.C - It helped to solve a common problem.D - It is hard to understand the purpose of this clause.E - When it was introduced, it is likely to have been unpopular.F - It is one of a number of clauses that deal with a similar topic.G - To people nowadays, it seems to be stating the obvious.A - Many people are familiar with it.B - It allows a person freedom of choice.C - It helped to solve a common problem.D - It is hard to understand the purpose of this clause.E - When it was introduced, it is likely to have been unpopular.F - It is one of a number of clauses that deal with a similar topic.G To people nowadays, it seems to be stating the obvious.

options.label: A
options.text: - Many people are familiar with it.

options.label: B
options.text: - It allows a person freedom of choice.

options.label: C
options.text: - It helped to solve a common problem.

options.label: D
options.text: - It is hard to understand the purpose of this clause.

options.label: E
options.text: - When it was introduced, it is likely to have been unpopular.

options.label: F
options.text: - It is one of a number of clauses that deal with a similar topic.

options.label: G
options.text: To people nowadays, it seems to be stating the obvious.
